    Method
    Description
    OTransactionIdPromise
    OTransactionSequenceManager.nextAt(int pos)
    This is public only for testing purposes
    OTransactionIdPromise
    OTransactionSequenceManager.promised(int position)

    Methods in com.orientechnologies.orient.core.transaction that return types with arguments of type OTransactionIdPromise
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<OTransactionIdPromise>
    OTransactionSequenceManager.next()
     
    Optional<ORawPair<OTransactionIdPromise,OTransactionIdPromise>>
    OTransactionSequenceManager.nextDDL()
    As today DDLs are not atomic, so we used two sequential for pre-operation and post operation to assert that the DDL was completed, as soon as DDLs will be atomic we can revert to a single sequential
    Optional<ORawPair<OTransactionIdPromise,OTransactionIdPromise>>
    OTransactionSequenceManager.nextDDL()
    As today DDLs are not atomic, so we used two sequential for pre-operation and post operation to assert that the DDL was completed, as soon as DDLs will be atomic we can revert to a single sequential
    Methods in com.orientechnologies.orient.core.transaction with parameters of type OTransactionIdPromise
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    OTransactionIdPromise.nextAccept(OTransactionIdPromise promise)

    OTransactionSequenceManager.notifySuccess(OTransactionIdPromise promise)
     
    ValidationResult
    OTransactionSequenceManager.validate(OTransactionIdPromise promise)

    ODistributedSynchronizedSequence.notifySuccess(OTransactionIdPromise id)
    This make sure that there is a synchronization between the apply of the status of transactions sequence and the logging of it in the database, to avoid to have in the status a transaction that has not yet been logged.
